properties.Test Case: In a book with more than 2 pages, type multi-sentence image descriptions and record some of them using by-sentence recording, some using by-paragraph. Also record audio of the regular text boxes. Ensure you have an Image Description for the front cover picture, and record it.
properties.Steps: In a book with more than 2 pages, type multi-sentence image descriptions and record some of them using by-sentence recording, some using by-paragraph. Also record audio of the regular text boxes. Ensure you have an Image Description for the front cover picture, and record it.

properties.Test Case: In above book, with Talking Book Tool open, navigate away from pages then back again; ensure highlighting of IDs recorded by sentence and recorded by paragraph display correctly.
properties.Steps: - In above book, with Talking Book Tool open, navigate away from pages then back again; ensure highlighting of IDs recorded by sentence and recorded by paragraph display correctly.

properties.Test Case: Format some image description text and formatting of words (bold, italic, color). Review the results in ePUB with "include image descriptions on page" TICKED. You should see the I.D. and all the text formatting preserved.
properties.Steps: Format some image description text and formatting of words (bold, italic, color). Review the results in ePUB with "include image descriptions on page" TICKED.  You should see the I.D. and all the text formatting preserved.

properties.Test Case: ePUB. Next check the I.D. Audio. The text of all I.D.s (including front cover) should display, be highlighted, and the audio should be heard. Ensure front cover I.D. audio plays correctly regardless of recording mode (sentence or paragraph). NOTE that you have to click "Play" in Readium.
properties.Steps: ePUB. Next check the I.D. Audio. The text of all I.D.s (including front cover) should display, be highlighted, and the audio should be heard. Ensure front cover I.D. audio plays correctly regardless of recording mode (sentence or paragraph). NOTE that you have to click "Play" in Readium.
